images.title: Festival Mondial de l'Image Sous-Marine 2014 - Stand de l'Ifremer (Ifremer 00739-85105 - 41637).jpg
images.description:
Ifremer was present at the 41st edition of the World Underwater Image Festival (WASHF), which took place from October 30 to November 2, 2014, at the Palais des Congrès, Parc Chanot, in Marseille.

The stand was divided into 3 angles:
- general public access to the SimuROV educational simulator, which allows virtual control of the Victor 6000 teleoperated robot;
- the "making-off" of the documentary "Abysses, the Alliances of the Depths", screened in the Auditorium;
- the presentation of the photographic series "The Mediterranean | From A to Z. Marine and underwater viewpoints, by Ifremer" to discover the marine and underwater riches of the Mediterranean, through the scientific and technological prisms of the Institute's activities and missions.

images.title: Common octopus (Octopus vulgaris) moving on sandy seabed during Sentinelle 4 project - Musée Subaquatique de Marseille - Anse des Catalans - 2025.jpg
images.description: A common octopus (Octopus vulgaris) photographed on the sandy seabed of Anse des Catalans at the Marseille Subaquatic Museum, during a biodiversity monitoring mission for the Sentinelle 4 project
